meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't collaborate (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't collaborate. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Collaboration Bottlenecks
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with fragmented workflows. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to scale your freelance development output efficiently.
content.answer_block: The 'can't collaborate' bottleneck vanishes when you adopt the Antigravity project template. By standardizing your architecture and leveraging Claude Code for autonomous context-aware development, you create a shared, repeatable codebase that allows for seamless asynchronous handoffs and rapid iteration, ensuring your freelance projects stay modular, scalable, and client-ready.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you’re three weeks into a high-stakes build, and the architecture begins to fray. Your client asks for a pivot, but your codebase is a monolithic mess—you’re the only one who can touch it, and even then, it’s a fragile house of cards. Collaboration becomes a pipe dream because every change risks a cascade of regressions. 

It’s time to move beyond the 'solo-dev' trap. By integrating the Antigravity project template, you transform your workflow into a modular, team-ready machine. This isn't just about organizing files; it's about building a robust foundation that allows AI agents like Claude Code to navigate, modify, and extend your project with surgical precision, turning your freelance work into a high-velocity, scalable production system.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root directory structure that enforces modularity, ensuring that logic, state, and UI are strictly decoupled.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity standard template, ensuring strict adherence to the modular directory architecture and dependency injection patterns.

steps.title: Inject Domain Context
steps.description: Feed your project constraints and architectural patterns into the system to define the 'rules of engagement' for future collaborators.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase and generate a comprehensive context.md file that defines the architectural constraints, naming conventions, and state management rules.

steps.title: Implement Asynchronous Handoff Hooks
steps.description: Configure the template to generate automated documentation and state snapshots for every pull request.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Antigravity build pipeline to trigger a state-snapshot documentation update on every commit.

steps.title: Automate Feature Scoping
steps.description: Use Claude Code to parse the Antigravity template and generate feature specs that match the existing architectural patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current architecture and generate a new feature specification for a user authentication module that follows the existing pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude prompt 'Generate spec for auth module' --output feature-spec.md

steps.title: Validate Integrity and Scalability
steps.description: Run a final audit to ensure the template is ready for multi-developer or AI-agent collaboration without collision.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a structural integrity audit on the project, checking for tight coupling or missing documentation in the modular components.

pro_tips: Always define a .antigravity-rules file to prevent LLMs from hallucinating non-existent patterns.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to persist project-specific terminology across sessions.
Structure your Antigravity components with dependency injection to allow for easy unit testing in isolation.
Never commit 'magic strings'; use the template's constant management layer to centralize configurations.
Run periodic architecture audits using Claude Code to catch 'architectural drift' before it becomes technical debt.
content.next_steps: Once the template is live, invite a peer or another AI agent to perform a code review on your first modular component to verify the handoff process.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for yourself and start building for scale. This workflow is the difference between a freelancer who burns out and an AI-augmented architect who dominates the market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
